name: Use Cases: Review use case file on save

action.message:
A use case file in use_cases/ was just saved. Please review it against the required interface contract:

1. REQUIRED EXPORTS — confirm all 9 functions present: connect, move_forward, move_backward, turn_left, turn_right, stop, is_error, reset_client, activate_camera
2. REQUIRED PHYSICS — confirm all 4 constants present: PHYSICS_MIN_TURN_RADIUS_M, PHYSICS_MAX_CORNER_SPEED, PHYSICS_FWD_SPEED_MS, PHYSICS_TURN_SPEED_MS
3. ERROR STRINGS — confirm every tool function wraps its body in try/except and returns f'Error in {func_name}: {exc}' — never raises
4. stop() SAFETY — confirm stop() attempts hardware stop even if connection is degraded; catches all exceptions
5. reset_client() — confirm it clears the cached connection (_CLIENT/_VEHICLE/_WS/_SOCK) and does not raise
6. activate_camera() — confirm it returns True if no camera; catches exceptions and returns False on failure
7. CREDENTIALS — confirm no passwords or API keys appear in return strings or log messages
8. PHYSICS VALUES — confirm PHYSICS_MIN_TURN_RADIUS_M is 0.0 for in-place robots, float('inf') for constrained robots (pipeline_crawler, camera_dolly)
9. PLATFORM_NAME and PLATFORM_DESC — confirm both are present
10. .env loading — confirm load_dotenv() is called at module level

Report any issues found.
